title: Watch Billie Eilisch Win Song Of The Year For 'WILDFLOWER' - GRAMMY.com
text:
Billie Eilsch's Song of the Year Win - 2026 Grammys

Based on the webpage content provided, we can confirm that Billie Eilsch won Song of the Year for "WILDFLOWER" at the 2026 Grammy Awards, as indicated in the page title: "Watch Billie Eilsch Win Song Of The Year For 'WILDFLOWER' | 2026 Grammys Acceptance Speech | GRAMMY.com"

The page serves as a hub linking to video content of her acceptance speech and award recognition. The specific achievement marks another major victory for the artist, recognizing the songwriting and composition of "Wildflower" by Billie Eilsch and Finneas O'Connell.
